sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74950" key="o)rqoka/qhmai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-κάθημαι</orth>, <sense id="n74950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sit upright,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
